name: ar-agents-mp-hello
description: Demo: Mercado Pago Subscriptions integration via @ar-agents/mercadopago. Wired to a real MP sandbox + production app 178743372667921. Demonstrates the full MercadoPago Agent Toolkit end-to-end. Not a productive sociedad-IA.
note: Single-library demo. Does NOT claim RFC-004 conformance — no audit-log endpoints (no /api/play/audit). Cite-by-reference to the reference implementation at ar-agents.ar for the full RFC-004 surface.
